overall.description: First-person perspective from a truck cabin in a driving simulator game, traveling through heavy snowfall at night. The vehicle drives along a snow-covered highway before entering a covered border checkpoint area and stopping at a barrier gate for document verification.

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the snow-covered highway with headlights illuminating the falling snow

entered.detail: snow-covered asphalt road stretching into the distance with visible tire tracks
large directional sign suspended over the highway indicating routes
tall street light pole illuminating the snowy roadside
snow-covered safety fence running parallel to the road

segments.scene_description: The truck travels along an open highway during a snowy night. Headlights cut through the darkness and falling snow, illuminating the snow-covered road ahead. Street lamps and overhead signs are visible in the distance against the dark sky.

events.description: truck enters covered checkpoint structure from open highway, transitioning from exposed snow to sheltered lanes

agents.ego_description: slowing down while driving through the covered checkpoint area with inspection booths visible on both sides

entered.detail: large metal roof structure covering the checkpoint lanes
concrete pillars supporting the checkpoint roof structure
small buildings for border control officers on both sides of the lanes

segments.scene_description: The truck enters a covered border checkpoint structure, leaving the open snow behind. The scene becomes sheltered under a large metal roof supported by concrete pillars. Checkpoint booths line both sides of the lane as the vehicle slows down and proceeds toward the inspection point.

scene_state.functional_zone: border checkpoint stop line with barrier gate

events.description: truck decelerates and comes to a complete stop at the checkpoint barrier
vehicle waits at the closed red-and-white barrier gate for document verification

agents.ego_description: stopped at the checkpoint barrier waiting for the gate to open and document check to complete

entered.detail: red and white striped barrier arm blocking the lane
lit window of the checkpoint booth where officers verify documents

segments.scene_description: The truck approaches the end of the checkpoint lane and stops at a closed barrier gate. The checkpoint booth window is visible to the left, illuminated from within. The vehicle remains stationary, waiting for the barrier to raise and clearance to proceed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it moves from an exposed, snowy highway into the sheltered confines of a border checkpoint. It begins with the vehicle traveling through a dark, snowy night, where headlights cut through the falling flakes to illuminate the road and distant overhead signs. As the truck advances, the open environment shifts into a covered structure, transitioning under a large metal roof supported by concrete pillars and lined with checkpoint booths. The scene then narrows as the vehicle slows down, proceeding through the sheltered lane before finally coming to a complete stop at a closed barrier gate. The shot concludes with the truck stationary beside an illuminated booth window, waiting for clearance to proceed.
